completed_tasks.verdict: VALIDATED — 003a inline SVG wins. All 16 types distinct at badge size. Resolved ✓×3, $×3, !×3 icon conflicts. Eliminated emoji (⏳→user-plus, 📦→archive).

decisions.decision: Fix double-header bug immediately without spiking
decisions.rationale: Clear code bug, not a design question

decisions.decision: DOM-omit mark-read button on read rows (not visibility:hidden)
decisions.rationale: visibility:hidden was causing dead space in every row
User explicitly said 'look first and foremost'

decisions.decision: 003a inline SVG wins over 003b symbol defs
decisions.rationale: Identical visual output; 003a self-contained, no index.html changes needed

decisions.decision: Heroicons outline set (24x24, stroke-width 1.75, round linecap/linejoin) chosen for all 16 types
decisions.rationale: Uniform visual weight, resolves all 3 icon conflicts, eliminates emoji, validated at badge size
